zh.lifeSummary: 當John Mowat於1365年11月24日出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾斯同豪斯時，他的父親George Mowat II30歲，母親Elizabeth Doull25歲。他於1396年與Jean Nicholson在蘇格蘭藍納可爾斯同豪斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1435年在英國蘇格蘭凱特內斯卡尼斯巴易享年70歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭凱特內斯卡尼斯巴易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Mowat于1365年11月24日出生在苏格兰藍納可爾斯同豪斯时，他的父亲George Mowat II30岁，母亲Elizabeth Doull25岁。他于1396年与Jean Nicholson在苏格兰藍納可爾斯同豪斯结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1435年在英国苏格兰凱特內斯卡尼斯巴易享年70岁，埋葬在苏格兰凱特內斯卡尼斯巴易。

nameMeanings.name: Mowat
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Caithness and Orkney): variant of   Mowatt  .

variants.name: Mowatt
meanings: Scottish (northeastern): habitational name from Mold (Flintshire), see Maude 1. The distinctive Scottish form of the name has arisen from a shift of stress in Mohaut from the second to the first syllable. In Caithness and Orkney, the surname is traditionally pronounced ‘Mode’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Mowat was born on 24 November 1365, in Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, George Mowat II, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Doull, was 25. He married Jean Nicholson in 1396, in Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1435, in Canisbay, Caithness, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Canisbay, Caithness, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Mowat est né le 24 novembre 1365, à Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, George Mowat II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Doull, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Jean Nicholson en 1396, à Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1435, à Canisbay, Caithness, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Canisbay, Caithness, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Mowat am 24. November 1365 in Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Mowat II 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Doull 25. Er hat 1396 in Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Scotland Jean Nicholson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1435 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Canisbay, Caithness, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Canisbay, Caithness, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Mowat è nato il il 24 novembre 1365 nel Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, George Mowat II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Doull, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Jean Nicholson nel 1396, nel Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1435, nel Canisbay, Caithness, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Canisbay, Caithness, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Mowatが1365年11月24日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアストーネハウゼで生まれた時，父George Mowat IIは30歳，母Elizabeth Doullは25歳であった。1396年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアストーネハウゼでJean Nicholsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1435年にイギリススコットランドケイスネスカニスバイで70歳で死去し，スコットランドケイスネスカニスバイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Mowat(이)가 1365년 11월 24일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 스톤하스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Mowat II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Doull(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1396년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 스톤하스에서 Jean Nicholson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1435년 영국 스코틀랜드 케이스네스 캔이스베이에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 케이스네스 캔이스베이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Mowat nasceu em 24 de novembro de 1365, em Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, George Mowat II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Doull, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Jean Nicholson em 1396, em Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1435, em Canisbay, Caithness, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Canisbay, Caithness, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Mowat родился 24 ноября 1365 г. в местности стоунэоус, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени George Mowat II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Doull, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Jean Nicholson в 1396 г. в местности стоунэоус, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1435 г. в местности канисбеи, цеитнесс, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности канисбеи, цеитнесс, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Mowat nació el 24 de noviembre de 1365, en Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, George Mowat II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Doull, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Jean Nicholson en 1396, en Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1435, en Canisbay, Caithness, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Canisbay, Caithness, Scotland.
